---
title: Maison monstre / Monster house
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557561/chalet_20250331_nt4mp4.png
description: Une autre maison monstre 
categories: ["children illustration"]
date: 2025-03-31
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557561/chalet_20250331_nt4mp4.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
